name: Creamed Tomato Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine butter and safflower oil in a soup pot; add onions; saute over low heat, sprinkling with thyme, basil, salt, and pepper. Stir occasionally.
2. When onions are tender, stir in tomatoes and tomato paste; simmer about 18 minutes.
3. Blend flour with an equal amount of chicken broth; add to tomato mixture and mix well.
4. Slowly add the remaining chicken broth, stirring well. Simmer covered, over low heat, for about 30 minutes. Stir occasionally to prevent soup from sticking to the bottom of the pan.
5. Puree the soup in small batches using a blender or hand mixer.
6. Reheat the puree and stir in sugar, cream, and milk. Simmer a few minutes before serving.
7. Add remaining butter just before serving.
